overall.description: First-person walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, featuring distinctive yellow and black mega-structures, industrial scaffolding, and light pedestrian traffic. The camera moves steadily along a city sidewalk before turning right to approach a restricted building entrance marked with red warning lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with commercial billboards

events.description: rusty brown truck drives past on the street from left to right
silver sports car drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk, observing the street traffic and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: rusty truck driving along the street from left to right
silver sports car driving from left to right

entered.detail: large vertical advertisement billboard with red and white graphics on the left side of the street
massive futuristic building with distinctive yellow and black color scheme and '04' signage
extensive metal scaffolding and construction framework along the right side of the street
tall metal street light pole with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street with a large billboard on the left and the iconic yellow and black mega-building visible in the distance on the right. The camera walks forward along the concrete sidewalk as a rusty truck and silver sports car pass by on the street. Industrial scaffolding lines the right side of the road, and the sky is partly cloudy with bright natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to industrial construction site

events.description: pedestrian in white outfit passes very close to the camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the building corner with construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top and pants walking toward and passing the camera closely

entered.detail: gray metal barrier fence running along the construction site on the right
piles of building materials and debris visible behind the fence

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking straight along the sidewalk, moving deeper into the urban environment. The mega-building looms larger on the right, now much closer, while industrial scaffolding and construction fences dominate the right side of the frame. A pedestrian in white passes very close to the camera. The billboard and street lamp from the previous segment fall behind as the camera advances toward the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: restricted building entrance under massive concrete overhang

events.description: turning right at the corner and entering the covered area beneath the mega-building
approaching the 'NO ENTRY' zone with illuminated red warning lights and biohazard symbols

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and walking under the building overhang toward the restricted entrance with red warning lights

entered.detail: illuminated red 'NO ENTRY' sign above the building entrance
rows of red triangular warning lights and biohazard symbols along the building base
massive angled concrete overhang structure forming the building entrance canopy

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, transitioning from the open street into a semi-covered area beneath the massive yellow and black building. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed as the camera approaches a restricted entrance marked with bright red 'NO ENTRY' signage and rows of red warning lights. The industrial scaffolding is now visible in the background on the left, while the building's concrete overhang dominates the overhead space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open cyberpunk thoroughfare into the shadowed depths of a restricted industrial zone. It begins by walking along a concrete sidewalk past a large billboard, with a rusty truck and silver sports car passing by as a yellow and black mega-building looms in the distance. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more crowded with construction fences and industrial scaffolding, while a pedestrian in white brushes past just before the street lamps and billboards fade into the background. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right at a corner, moving from the natural light of the open street into a dark, enclosed area beneath the massive building's concrete overhang. Finally, the perspective closes in on a restricted entrance defined by rows of glowing red warning lights and prominent no entry signage.
